source.business_scenario: 聚合查询触发 Row Adapter
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(p.amount) AS total
FROM customer c
JOIN payment p ON c.customer_id = p.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id
LIMIT 20

SELECT c.customer_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(p.amount) AS total

GROUP BY c.customer_id
LIMIT 20;
